text: Any person who violates any provision of this article 7 for which another penalty is not prescribed by law commits a class A traffic infraction.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-507 — Penalty

Any person who violates any provision of this article 7 for which another penalty is not prescribed by law commits a class A traffic infraction.

subsections.text: Any person who violates any provision of this article 7 for which another penalty is not prescribed by law commits a class A traffic infraction.
